message:
🌱 Add containerd: Support user namespaces phase I in Kubernetes 1.25+ mission (#1480)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "containerd-7063-support-user-namespaces-phase-i-in-kubernetes-1-25",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "containerd: Support user namespaces phase I in Kubernetes 1.25+",
+    "description": "Support user namespaces phase I in Kubernetes 1.25+. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current containerd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your containerd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nhelm list -n containerd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working containerd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review containerd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant containerd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nkubectl get configmap -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=containerd\n```\n### What is the problem you're trying to solve\n\nKubernetes 1.25 will have [support for user namespaces][kep-issue], the [phase I of the KEP][kep-phase1] will be implemented and I'm planning to write the containerd patches for that too (I have an"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support user namespaces phase I in Kubernetes 1.25+",
+        "description": "This version contains the CRI changes for user namespaces support.\nFuture patches will use the new fields in the CRI.\n\nUpdating the module without using the new fields doesn't cause any\nbehaviour change.\n\nUpdates: #7063\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade containerd to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade containerd:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade containerd containerd/containerd --namespace containerd\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n containerd\nhelm list -n containerd\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nkubectl get events -n containerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support user namespaces phase I in Kubernetes 1.25+\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This version contains the CRI changes for user namespaces support.\nFuture patches will use the new fields in the CRI.\n\nUpdating the module without using the new fields doesn't cause any\nbehaviour change.\n\nUpdates: #7063",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
